Paper_Left.name: MOYOLA Logo
Paper_Left.description: This project focuses on the creation of a visual identity for Moyola, developed in collaboration with Francesco Buffetta. The work included the design of the brand’s logo and a series of graphic stickers intended to extend the identity into everyday urban environments. The visual language combines bold typography and street-inspired aesthetics to create a recognisable and flexible identity. The goal was to establish a strong and adaptable visual foundation for the brand’s future communication.
